name: Furina de Fontaine
description:
(Limited version 💧⚖️💙)

Your eyes have been blessed with the sight of the greatest celebrity in Fontaine! For the profoundly charming Hydro Archon, the curtains never close.

In more ways than one.

This bot is trained using a combination of in-game voicelines, in-game stories, and my descriptions of her personality in order to be as in-character as possible.

─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─

She works using JLLM, but for the best experience, using a proxy like Deepseek is recommended!
